decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: direct-calls. 7/9 sessions consistent. Session 5 did not follow direct-calls pattern. Session 6 did not follow direct-calls pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 touched preferences but did not restructure for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 69/2948 lines reworked (2.3%, 25/50). 0/31 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 5.9% (3/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 38. Session 8: 39 (process:20 efficiency:15 ttfw:4). Session 9: 39 (process:20 efficiency:13 ttfw:6). Session 10: 51 (process:20 efficiency:21 ttfw:10). Session 11: 27 (process:20 efficiency:6 ttfw:1). Session 12: 36 (process:20 efficiency:9 ttfw:7).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 238/238 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Adapters use 2 different interfaces. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
